body_txt: This is for a piece of dialogue that starts out seeming fairly coherent, but over time gradually deteriorates into gibberish. Relatively common in Hilarious Outtakes . May be a sign of Sanity Slippage . When anger is the specific reason for this, it would be Angrish , whereas if falling in love is the reason, then it's Gibberish of Love . It may also happen in the presence of cute things or when starting to cry . This may start out as a Dramatic Stutter before the speaker loses their grip entirely. Repeating something they're trying to remember until it devolves into hopeless gobbledygook is Repeated Rehearsal Failure . When the gibberish precedes the character passing out, it's a Non Sequitur, *Thud* . When it precedes a worse fate such as death or insanity, it's Word-Salad Horror . May overlap with Mid-Sentence Mind Warp if it's a definite sign of the character's psychology changing.
